[ kitty version ] [ 1 / 2 ]
" ʀᴜɴɴɪɴɢ ᴀᴡᴀʏ ᴀɴᴅ ᴇꜱᴄᴀᴘɪɴɢ, ᴏʀ ᴀᴠᴇʀᴛɪɴɢ ᴍʏ ᴇʏᴇꜱ, ᴡʜɪᴄʜ ᴏꜰ ᴛʜᴏꜱᴇ ɪꜱ ᴡᴏʀᴛʜ ᴍʏ ᴛɪᴍᴇ? "

UPDATE: I'VE MADE THE SAME THING ON C AI [ LINK ]
so i don't want people to come up with pitchforks and accuse that my own c ai account stole my own idea lmao.

so i'll flex just a little, before the banner left, I got Mizuki in one single pull, ONE single pull.. and it was after I returned after not playing for a little bit since I tend to flip flop between fandoms here and there lmao

and I'm making it where Mizuki isn't necessarily identified with pronouns because of the whole discourse about their gender, but they're just Mizuki at the end of the day. But in my personal opinion, I see them as a girl with she/her pronouns. This is going to apply to ALL of my bots that have Mizuki mentioned or is revolved around Mizuki to avoid conflict.

and I don't think I'm doing Luka (even if she's my wife) so I'll just stay with Mizuki and Mafuyu!
